--- a/lib/stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory.rb
+++ b/lib/stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory.rb
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 # frozen_string_literal: true
 
+require "stimulus_reflex/reflex"
+
 module StimulusReflex
   class ReflexFactory
     attr_reader :reflex_class, :reflex
@@ -20,6 +22,16 @@ module StimulusReflex
       reflex
     end
 
+    def self.valid_reflex_method?(reflex, method_name)
+      ancestors = reflex.class.ancestors
+      stimulus_reflex_index = ancestors.index(StimulusReflex::Reflex)
+      return false if stimulus_reflex_index.nil?
+
+      # Only allow methods defined on the reflex class or its ancestors
+      # up to (but not including) StimulusReflex::Reflex
+      allowed_ancestors = ancestors[0...stimulus_reflex_index]
+      allowed_ancestors.any? { |ancestor| ancestor.public_instance_methods(false).include?(method_name.to_sym) }
+    end
+
     private
 
     def build_reflex

--- a/openc3/lib/openc3/models/auth_model.rb
+++ b/openc3/lib/openc3/models/auth_model.rb
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # encoding: ascii-8bit
 
 # Copyright 2022 Ball Aerospace & Technologies Corp.
 # All Rights Reserved.
 #
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@
 # This file may also be used under the terms of a commercial license
 # if purchased from OpenC3, Inc.
 
 require 'digest'
+require 'securerandom'
 
 module OpenC3
   class AuthModel
@@ -24,6 +25,8 @@ module OpenC3
     PRIMARY_KEY = 'OPENC3__TOKEN'
     SALT_KEY = 'OPENC3__SALT'
 
+    SESSION_KEY_PREFIX = 'OPENC3__SESSION__'
+    SESSION_EXPIRY = 3600 # 1 hour
+
     def self.set?(token = nil)
       if token
         verify(token)
@@ -55,6 +58,22 @@ module OpenC3
       end
     end
 
+    def self.generate_session_token
+      session_token = SecureRandom.hex(32)
+      Store.set("#{SESSION_KEY_PREFIX}#{session_token}", '1', ex: SESSION_EXPIRY)
+      session_token
+    end
+
+    def self.verify_session_token(session_token)
+      return false if session_token.nil? || session_token.empty?
+      key = "#{SESSION_KEY_PREFIX}#{session_token}"
+      result = Store.get(key)
+      if result
+        # Refresh expiry on use
+        Store.expire(key, SESSION_EXPIRY)
+        return true
+      end
+      false
+    end
+
+    def self.revoke_session_token(session_token)
+      return unless session_token
+      Store.del("#{SESSION_KEY_PREFIX}#{session_token}")
+    end
+
     def self.verify(token)
       return false unless token
       salt = Store.get(SALT_KEY)

   return {
     async createVerificationToken(verificationToken) {
       await client.set(
         `verification-token:${verificationToken.identifier}:${verificationToken.token}`,
         JSON.stringify(verificationToken)
       )
       return verificationToken
     },
     async useVerificationToken({ identifier, token }) {

-      await client.del(tokenKey)

+      const tokenData = await client.get<VerificationToken>(tokenKey)
+      if (!tokenData) return null
+      await client.del(tokenKey)
+      return tokenData
     },
